examples: Watch out when crossing the street.
She told me to watch out for scams.
Watch out for icy patches on the road.
Watch out! There's a car coming.
They need to watch out for each other.
example_translate: Им нужно присматривать друг за другом.
watch out.synonyms: Быть осторожным, остерегаться - be careful, take care, beware
